title: Smoky Savory American Tomatoes Grill
description: A briny, cheese-pull American dish featuring smoky grilled tomatoes, perfect for a summer evening, made with ayurvedic-sattvic friendly ingredients and served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the tomatoes into 1/2 inch thick rounds and brush both sides with olive oil.
Season the tomato slices with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Grill the tomato slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they have a nice char and tender texture.
Top each grilled tomato slice with a round of smoked mozzarella cheese.
Drizzle the balsamic vinegar over the cheese and tomatoes.
Sprinkle chopped fresh basil leaves over the top of each tomato slice.
Serve the smoky savory American tomatoes grill on a bamboo tray immediately.
